---
title: "Adding Interactive Tooltips to HTML Text Using tippy in Qmd Files"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

This tutorial will walk you through the process of using the [tippy](https://tippy.john-coene.com/) package to add interactive tooltips to text elements in an HTML page, specifically within Qmd files. By the end of this tutorial, you'll know how to enrich your website with informative tooltips that appear when readers hover over specific sections of your content.

# Set Up

First, create a Qmd file.  

Next, you'll need to install the tippy package.  

```{r}
install.packages("tippy")
```

# Code in Qmd file

Call the tippy library
```{r}
library(tippy)
```
